review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI re-review verified synthetic_only_fixture_policy is correctly bound to RP00.P00.M06.S01, remains metadata-only, forbids real fixture data sources, requires synthetic markers/domains/prefixes, records H00 evidence, and does not claim migration, anonymization, production seed, real-data import, production mutation, or RP00 completion.

findings.title: Prior non-goal wording P3 confirmed fixed; minor summary-vs-detailed forbidden-list breadth difference remains (non-blocking)
findings.details: Re-review confirms the previously flagged P3 wording issue is resolved. The authoritative synthetic_only_fixture_policy.forbidden_data_sources list covers all required sources, including real_bank_account, real_tax_identifier, real_document_version, production_export, and customer_support_attachment. The coarse synthetic_data_policy.forbidden_data_classes summary remains narrower than the authoritative list. This is a documentation-parity note and does not block M06.S01 closeout.
findings.recommendation: Optionally expand synthetic_data_policy.forbidden_data_classes or add a cross-reference to synthetic_only_fixture_policy.forbidden_data_sources in RP00.P00.M07.S01 to prevent future drift.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI re-review completed with PASS_WITH_FINDINGS and no P0/P1/P2 findings. A first C00 run found one P3 purpose wording issue; that was fixed before this re-review. The remaining P3 documentation-parity note is deferred to RP00.P00.M07.S01 because the authoritative policy and validator are complete for M06.
